label: sec-indexer
description: Background indexer for SEC EDGAR filings. Watches ~/clarion/queue/ and runs the fetch → extract → tree → save pipeline. Idempotent on filing accession.

_notes.env_vars_syntax: Values like '$ZO_API_KEY' tell Zo to resolve the named secret (Settings → Advanced → Secrets) at service start. SEC_USER_AGENT is optional — if no secret of that name exists, the service falls back to the lib's DEFAULT_USER_AGENT.
_notes.param_names: Use 'workdir' and 'env_vars' (snake_case) when calling register_user_service — these are the canonical keys Zo's service tool accepts.
